indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the rows of chairs obstructing the open floor space required for these activities. The lack of unobstructed floor area makes it impossible to deploy a yoga mat or perform any stretching poses.
